description:
Recto: Legal testimony. Stating that Yeshuʿa Peʾer ha-Qahal and Bunyām b. Sibāʿ and his mother and Ḥāzim appeared and fought over 1.5 dinars that Sibāʿ owed to Ḥāzim, with Yeshuʿa attempting to mediate. They reached a settlement that Bunyām would pay 30 dirhams and his mother would pay 10 dirhams over a period of 4 months. The date might be 1525 Seleucid, but this is written in an unusual way, and 400 is crossed out and replaced with 500. If 1525 is correct, then the document is dated 1213/14 CE. 

See separate record for verso (blessings for the caliph or sultan in Judaeo-Arabic).
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
